mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_qna q LEFT JOIN tbl_member m ON q.author = m.id
q.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') q.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') (q.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) (q.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR q.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR q.author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_qna (title, content, author, lev, par) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{author}, #{lev}, #{par})
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_qna SET title = #{title}, content = #{content} WHERE qno = #{qno}
UPDATE tbl_qna SET cnt = cnt + 1 WHERE qno = #{qno}
